TENEBRE.Settings.MenuHint: Configure all optional systems from Symbaroum Ind Resources.
TENEBRE.Settings.HideCompatibilityNotice: Old local preference kept to migrate compatibility notices that were already confirmed.
TENEBRE.Settings.CompatibilityNoticeAckn: Locally records which conflicts were already confirmed. New conflicts show the notice again.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.Title: Tenebre Resources: Compatibility Notice
TENEBRE.Compatibility.Intro: Tenebre Resources detected active modules that touch the same Foundry areas or have external compatibility risks. To avoid blocking the world, Tenebre changed or disabled some of its own integrations.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.Footer: This is not a fatal error. This notice explains which functionality may behave differently while these modules remain active.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.DoNotShowAgain: Do not show these listed notices again
TENEBRE.Compatibility.Bithir.Effect: Tenebre's bundled Bithir utilities were disabled so they do not compete for the game.bithirmod namespace with the official Bithir module. Use the official Bithir module features while it remains active.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.DragRuler.Feature: Tenebre movement ruler and movement validation
TENEBRE.Compatibility.DragRuler.Effect: Tenebre's colored movement ruler and automatic movement blocking were disabled so they do not compete with Drag Ruler. Drag Ruler controls measurement/movement while it remains active.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.TokenSounds.Effect: Token Audio FX declares Foundry minimum 14. On Foundry 13 it may fail independently from Tenebre. Tenebre does not patch this module.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.CalendariaSdm.Effe: Calendaria: SDM is active without the base Calendaria module active. Calendar features may fail until the dependency is installed/enabled.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.Tokenizers.Effect: Two tokenizer modules are active at the same time. They may duplicate menus or compete over image workflows. Tenebre only reports this and does not interfere with them.
TENEBRE.Compatibility.TabletopRpgMusic.E: Tabletop RPG Music targets an older Foundry compatibility range. Audio or playlists may fail due to that module itself. Tenebre does not patch it.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableRationsHint: Track uses per Travel Bread unit.
TENEBRE.Settings.RationUsesHint: Number of feeding days per unit.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableAmmoConsumptionHi: Consumes one ammunition item when a marked weapon fires.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableHitTrackingHint: Tracks arrows and bolts that hit during combat.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableAmmoRecoveryHint: Allows recovery of ammunition that hit.
TENEBRE.Settings.ShowSpecialAmmoInChatHi: Posts a chat card when the chosen ammunition has a description.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableHungerHint: Adds the Hunger status to the HUD and applies the optional starvation rule.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableRestHealingHint: Applies Toughness recovery when resting via the Recover button.
TENEBRE.Settings.RestHealingHint: Amount recovered per day of rest.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableEncumbranceHint: Tracks carried items against the Strong attribute. Optional rule from the Advanced Player's Guide.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableMovementRulerHint: Colors the token ruler by Symbaroum movement limits and applies hunger, encumbrance, and maneuver effects.
TENEBRE.Settings.EncumbranceDiscoveredWe: Encumbrance rule database learned from world items, actor items, and compendia.
TENEBRE.Rations.TooltipFull:
{quantity} units · {uses} uses remaining
Click to consume 1 day
TENEBRE.Rations.NoRations: This character has no Travel Bread.
TENEBRE.Rations.ConsumedUse: Day consumed. {uses} Travel Bread days remain.
TENEBRE.Rations.ConsumedUnit: One Travel Bread unit was consumed. {quantity} remain.
TENEBRE.Ammo.ReloadNoAmmo: You do not have any loose arrows or bolts in your inventory.
TENEBRE.Ammo.UnloadEmpty: The quiver/case has no loaded ammunition.
TENEBRE.Hud.RecoverableTooltip: {count} arrow(s) or bolt(s) can be rolled for recovery.
TENEBRE.Recovery.NoHits: There are no arrow or bolt hits to recover.
TENEBRE.Recovery.NewChatRoll: {actor} rolled for projectile recovery. A total of {total} projectiles were recovered.
TENEBRE.Rest.NoActorsSelectedKeybinding: Select a token or bind a player character to rest.
TENEBRE.Rest.NoActorsSelected: Select at least one player character token.
TENEBRE.Keybindings.OpenRestDialogHint: Opens the rest dialog for controlled characters.
TENEBRE.Rest.ChatNoEffect: Already at full Toughness and no temporary corruption.
TENEBRE.Hunger.EffectDescription: Optional rule: no natural healing; two chances to fail every success test; movement reduced by half; one Strong test per day, failure applies -1 to the Strong modifier. Total Strong 0 means death by starvation.
TENEBRE.Hunger.MovementReminder: While Hungry, the character can only move at half speed.
TENEBRE.Hunger.RemovedBody: Hunger has ended, but {penalty} lost Strong point(s) remain. Recover 1 naturally per rest day, or use healing and powers as if they were Toughness.
TENEBRE.Hunger.RecoveryBlocked: While the character is still Hungry, healing and powers do not recover Strong lost to starvation.
TENEBRE.Hunger.RecoveryBody: Recovered {amount} Strong point(s) lost to Hunger ({source}).
TENEBRE.Hunger.NaturalRecovery: Recovered {amount} Strong point(s) lost to Hunger
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.Title: Maneuvers
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.AttackBlocked: This maneuver prevents the character from attacking right now.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.InitiativeBonusPending: Apply {bonus} initiative when choosing the new position.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.PlayerOnly: Automated maneuvers are available only for player sheets.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.OneTarget: Choose exactly one target before rolling this maneuver.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.InvalidDamage: Enter the damage value before rolling Knockout.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.DelayInitiativeNote: Delays your action in the turn and marks that another creature may act before you.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.GrappleNote: Keeps the target held if the test wins. Robust on the actor and on the target is applied automatically.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.DisarmNote: Attacks a weapon or shield; it deals no damage. On success, the target receives Disarmed.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.FreeAttackOnFailure: On failure, the target may make a Free Attack against you.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.KnockoutNote: If 1d12 is below the entered damage, the target is knocked out.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.KnockoutAttackFirst: Roll the advantaged attack first; this button resolves only the knockout check.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.TotalDefenseNote: Gets a second chance on Defense tests until the end of the turn, but cannot attack.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.TotalOffenseNote: Gets a second chance to hit with melee attacks, but also a second chance to fail Defense tests this turn.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.ShoveNote: Must start the turn with the shove and spend both combat action and movement action. On success, deals half normal damage and pushes the target 5 meters.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.KnockdownNote: Attempts to knock the target down with [Strong versus Strong]. Then rolls Quick to see if you also fall.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.ChargeNote: Moves in a straight line with double movement and a melee attack. If the attack fails, the target gets a Free Attack.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.CarefulAimNote: Spends the movement action to aim. The next ranged attack gets a second chance to succeed.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.PoisonWeaponNote: On a successful Cunning test, applies poison to the weapon for one single hit. A result of 20 poisons the user.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.TakeInitiativeNote: Rolls Resolute to gain +5 initiative. Regardless of the result, gets a second chance to fail Success Tests this turn.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.ManualPending: Full text pending: resolve manually until this rule is registered.
TENEBRE.ItemFlags.Title: Tenebre Resources
TENEBRE.Containers.NoContainers: This character has no available backpack, bag, chest, or other container.
TENEBRE.Containers.CannotStoreOther: This item is set to Other. To store it, change its state to Equipped or Active.
TENEBRE.Containers.CannotStoreInOther: The container is set to Other. To store items in it, change the container state to Equipped or Active.
TENEBRE.Containers.CannotWithdrawOther: The container is set to Other. To withdraw items, change the container state to Equipped or Active.
TENEBRE.Encumbrance.Title: Encumbrance

BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_l4: Location - Tent, camp, travelling companions, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_e5: Event - Journey, travel, far away, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_c1: Creatures - Unknown, historic being, god, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_c3: Creatures - Undead, dragoul, dead creature, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_c4: Creatures - Abomination, blight creature, demon, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_c5: Creatures - Cultural Being, Ambrian, Barbarian, Elderfolk, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_c6: Creatures - Unique creature, elemental, dragon, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_r3: Reward - Gold, monetary reward, riches, etc
BITHIRMOD.inspiration_tooltip_r6: Reward - Clue, insight, valuble information, etc
BITHIRMOD.SHADOW_hideGeneration_hint: Hides the option for generating shadows
BITHIRMOD.SHADOW_hideLabel_hint: Hides the Generate Shadow label from the character sheet
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableRestButtonHint: Adds the Rest button to player character sheet headers.
TENEBRE.Settings.MovementUnitSystemHint: Choose whether the movement ruler uses meters or feet for Symbaroum movement limits.
TENEBRE.Settings.MovementBaseMetersHint: Distance covered by one movement action when using metric measurement.
TENEBRE.Settings.MovementBaseFeetHint: Distance covered by one movement action when using imperial measurement.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableManeuversHint: Shows the maneuver controls and applies maneuver automation, effects, and roll modifiers.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableModernChatHint: Reorganizes attack, ability, ritual, item, and maneuver messages into clearer cards. Disable it to use the system legacy layout.
TENEBRE.Settings.ModernChatStyleHint: Chooses between the module illustrated layout or the original Symbaroum system chat.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableChatItemUse: Enable item/ability chat use for animations
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableChatItemUseHint: Adds an option to post abilities, rituals, and items to chat with Automated Animations-compatible data.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableClearEffectsButto: Shows the sheet header button that removes active status effects from the actor.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableTokenActionHudInt: Adds Symbaroum Ind Resources actions to Token Action HUD when that module is active.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableBithirUtilitiesHi: Enables Aroaleta verses, inspiration rolls, NPC/monster generator, forest event utilities, and related tables.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableGenerateShadowHin: Shows the Generate Shadow control on actor sheets when utility features are enabled.
TENEBRE.Settings.BithirUtilitiesDisabled: Utility macros are disabled in Symbaroum Ind Resources settings.
TENEBRE.Maneuvers.Disabled: Maneuvers are disabled in Symbaroum Ind Resources settings.
TENEBRE.Settings.ShowAmmoRecoveryHudHint: Shows the recoverable ammunition button next to the hotbar when recovery is available.
TENEBRE.Settings.ShowQuiverHudHint: Shows equipped quivers and loaded ammunition next to the hotbar.
TENEBRE.Settings.EnableContainersHint: Allows storing items inside backpacks, bags, chests, and other containers. Stored items are hidden under their container.
TENEBRE.ChatItemUse.Disabled: Item/ability chat use is disabled in Symbaroum Ind Resources settings.
TENEBRE.ChatItemUse.NotAvailable: This item cannot be sent to chat by this automation.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.HungerRemovedFlavor: {actor} recovered from the effects of hunger. Hunger has ended, but {penalty} lost Strong point(s) remain. Recover 1 naturally per rest day, or use healing and powers as if they were Toughness.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.RestHungerSuccessFlav: {actor} rested for {days} day(s) and passed the starvation test.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.RestHungerFailureFlav: {actor} rested for {days} day(s), but failed the starvation test.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.RestHungerDeadFlavor: {actor} rested for {days} day(s), failed the starvation test, and died of starvation.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.ResistRequestFlavorNo: {actor} attacked using {item}, waiting for resistance test.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.ResistNoticeLine: {target} must click the "Roll resistance" button in chat to roll resistance against the attack
TENEBRE.ModernChat.DeathRollTestBestOfTw: 2d20, keep the lower result, against 10 or less
TENEBRE.ModernChat.DeathRollTestWorstOfT: 2d20, keep the higher result, against 10 or less
TENEBRE.ModernChat.DeathRollSuccessFlavo: {actor} passed the death roll and may remain alive for now.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.DeathRollCriticalSucc: {actor} critically succeeded on the death roll and recovered {healing} Toughness.
TENEBRE.ModernChat.DeathRollCriticalFail: {actor} critically failed the death roll and drew their last breath.
